title: DSE 英文資源分享 (5** vocab 筆記)

replies.msg:
DSE 英文資源分享 (5** vocab 筆記)


1. come to a halt 停止前進
2. pull oneself together 振作起來 / 鎮定下來
3. a feather in one’s cap 某人的榮譽標誌
4. spare no pains 全力以赴
5. read between the lines 弦外之音
6. say no to sth / sby 拒絕
7. has aroused much social concern 引起社會很大關注
8. There has been much concern recently about 最近…引起很大的關注
9. is beneficial/detrimental to 某事對…有益 / 某事對…有害
10. contribute much to 引致
11. shoulder one’s responsibility to 負起責任去
12. keep problems to oneself 將問題藏在心裡
13. struggle to find ways to combat the problem某某努力找出解決問題的方法
14. There should be more co-operations between sby and sby to 某人和某人之間應該多點合作
15. take/end their won lives 輕生
16. act in a violent fashion 行為傾向暴力
17. turn emotions inwards 把情緒隱藏內心
18. …, with sth and sth being the major reasons 其中…和…是主因
19. resort to violence 訴諸暴力
20. stem from 根源於






~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
